hero.title: Reliable Liquified Gas Transportation
hero.subtitle: By rail and road — across Turkmenistan

services.heading: Our Services
services.description: Two core directions for safe and efficient liquified gas transportation

rail.title: Railway Transport
rail.description: We deliver liquified gas in specialized tank cars to any destination across the country. The railway network is the most reliable method for transporting large volumes over long distances.

truck.title: Truck Transport
truck.description: Delivery of liquified gas by specialized tanker trucks in the shortest possible time. Flexible logistics and door-to-door service.

about.heading: About Us
about.text: Täze Gatnaw is a leading logistics company in Turkmenistan. We specialize in the reliable and safe transportation of liquified gas by railway and road transport.
about.text2: Our company is equipped with state-of-the-art technology and staffed by experienced professionals. Delivering the highest quality service is our primary goal.

fleet.heading: Our Fleet
fleet.description: A powerful material and technical base equipped with modern technology

safety.heading: Safety & Standards
safety.description: Safety is the foundation of our operations

monitoring.title: 24/7 Monitoring
monitoring.description: All vehicles are under continuous surveillance and control

certified.title: International Standards
certified.description: We operate in compliance with ISO and international safety standards

training.title: Professional Training
training.description: Our staff regularly undergo advanced qualification courses

emergency.title: Emergency Response
emergency.description: Our rapid response team is ready for any situation

geography.heading: Service Geography
geography.description: An extensive route network connecting major cities and industrial centers of Turkmenistan

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: Contact us — we'll find the optimal solution for you
